co_star_g.context: The following prompts are designed to assist users in generating high-quality XML documents based on predefined technical parameters. Each prompt guides the user through various stages of document creation, enhancing clarity and structure in their technical writing tasks.
co_star_g.objectives: To provide clear and concise guidance for the user to create effective XML documents while focusing on technical accuracy and relevance.
co_star_g.situation: The user is engaging with a technical audience that requires detailed and structured XML documents for various applications.
co_star_g.tasks: 1. Define the purpose of the XML document. 2. Outline the necessary elements and attributes. 3. Provide instructions on how to validate the XML. 4. Ensure the document adheres to best practices in XML formatting.
co_star_g.action: Guide the user through each task with clear examples and validation techniques to enhance their understanding of XML best practices.
co_star_g.results: The user will create a comprehensive and valid XML document that meets technical requirements and standards, ready for implementation in their respective projects.
